spawnTable.comment: roll in [0,1): < rareTop => rare; else if < uncommonTop => uncommon; else common (matches previous 10% / 30% / 60% split)

creatures.label: blobby
creatures.tagline: believes every finished pomodoro deserves a tiny parade.
creatures.quoteCaught: you did it!! i knew you could!!

creatures.label: squish
creatures.tagline: notices when you wander; never uses a mean voice.
creatures.quoteCaught: hey, welcome back. want to try one more minute with me?

creatures.label: bouncy
creatures.tagline: teases you for being dramatic, then shares snacks.
creatures.quoteCaught: okay okay, you caught me—i’m proud of you, nerd.

creatures.label: pip
creatures.tagline: treats your to-do list like a sacred scroll.
creatures.quoteCaught: we’re really doing this!! you’re doing this!!

creatures.label: noodle
creatures.tagline: low battery buddy who cheers from the floor.
creatures.quoteCaught: nnnf… nice catch. can we nap after this sprint?

creatures.label: mochi
creatures.tagline: remembers every time you fed them.
creatures.quoteCaught: you chose me!! i’ll be good, i promise-promise.

creatures.label: pea
creatures.tagline: shakes before crossing the screen, then goes anyway.
creatures.quoteCaught: i was scared you’d miss me… you didn’t.

creatures.label: button
creatures.tagline: thinks you need guarding from procrastination gremlins.
creatures.quoteCaught: gotcha. the gremlins lose today.

creatures.label: smudge
creatures.tagline: doesn’t keep score when focus breaks.
creatures.quoteCaught: fresh start energy. i’m still here.

creatures.label: dewdrop
creatures.tagline: rain-on-window vibes during hard readings.
creatures.quoteCaught: deep breath. you caught a calm little moment.

creatures.label: crumbs
creatures.tagline: motivated by crumbs, metaphors, and extra credit.
creatures.quoteCaught: feed me later? …i mean hi. hi.

creatures.label: twirl
creatures.tagline: turns studying into a tiny dance break.
creatures.quoteCaught: click!! that’s a rhythm. keep going.

creatures.label: blip
creatures.tagline: loves syllabi, footnotes, and color-coded notes.
creatures.quoteCaught: caught! now we can optimize your brain together.

creatures.label: wobble
creatures.tagline: admits when they’re overwhelmed too.
creatures.quoteCaught: i wobbled… you still caught me. thanks.

creatures.label: flufflet
creatures.tagline: emotional support shape with eyes.
creatures.quoteCaught: you’re doing more than you think. really.

creatures.label: pebble
creatures.tagline: quiet hype that shows up every session.
creatures.quoteCaught: solid. steady. you too.

creatures.label: zeppy
creatures.tagline: lives for the stretch between pomodoros.
creatures.quoteCaught: catch me now—break hugs later?

creatures.label: glimmer
creatures.tagline: looks for silver linings in midterms.
creatures.quoteCaught: tiny win: you showed up. that counts huge.

creatures.label: coddle
creatures.tagline: wants you hydrated and loved.
creatures.quoteCaught: good job, sweet human. drink water soon, okay?

creatures.label: snippet
creatures.tagline: breaks big assignments into snack-sized steps.
creatures.quoteCaught: one snippet at a time. you’ve got this.

creatures.label: hoop
creatures.tagline: claps when you return after a distraction.
creatures.quoteCaught: back on track! that’s the whole game.

creatures.label: dottie
creatures.tagline: asks what class this is in a cute way.
creatures.quoteCaught: ooh, what are we learning today?

creatures.label: kiki
creatures.tagline: randomized compliments, always sincere.
creatures.quoteCaught: you’re like… surprisingly powerful. yeah.

creatures.label: mossball
creatures.tagline: believes moss grows on rolling syllabi.
creatures.quoteCaught: slow progress is still moss… i mean growth.

creatures.label: sunbean
creatures.tagline: bright for 8ams even when you aren’t.
creatures.quoteCaught: rise-and-catch! you’re glowing a little.

creatures.label: ticktock
creatures.tagline: friendly with clocks, not scary about them.
creatures.quoteCaught: time’s moving, and so are you.

creatures.label: hushpuff
creatures.tagline: silence is a love language.
creatures.quoteCaught: shh—we did a good focus. proud of us.

creatures.label: scribble
creatures.tagline: doodles in margins of your brain.
creatures.quoteCaught: messy draft energy—but look, you caught me!

creatures.label: pocket
creatures.tagline: fits in your pocket between classes.
creatures.quoteCaught: i’ll stick with you. pocket promise.

creatures.label: beanie
creatures.tagline: wants you to wear something soft.
creatures.quoteCaught: cozy catch. you’re doing amazing.

creatures.label: sparky
creatures.tagline: turns ‘i guess i’ll try’ into ‘LET’S GO’.
creatures.quoteCaught: YESSS THAT CLICK FELT LEGENDARY!!

creatures.label: periwinkle
creatures.tagline: half here, half in the essay you’ll finish.
creatures.quoteCaught: soft focus, strong heart.

creatures.label: taffy
creatures.tagline: bounces back from bad grades with you.
creatures.quoteCaught: stretch, stick, succeed. we’re elastic.

creatures.label: citron
creatures.tagline: citrus-sharp reminders that you’re capable.
creatures.quoteCaught: zing! you’re sharper than you feel.

creatures.label: indigo
creatures.tagline: likes lamp light and lo-fi honesty.
creatures.quoteCaught: late-night legend energy. caught.

creatures.label: coral wave
creatures.tagline: rides stress like a wave, not a wall.
creatures.quoteCaught: surf’s up—on focus. nice grab.

creatures.label: frosted
creatures.tagline: panic is thawable.
creatures.quoteCaught: cool catch. breathe out once for me.

creatures.label: ember glow
creatures.tagline: small fire, long burn.
creatures.quoteCaught: keep that ember. you earned this catch.

creatures.label: mint whisk
creatures.tagline: new week new leaf (literally).
creatures.quoteCaught: minty clean slate. hi.

creatures.label: cobalt
creatures.tagline: cuts through brain fog with kindness.
creatures.quoteCaught: clarity: unlocked. you + me.

creatures.label: lil loop
creatures.tagline: spots loops in schedules and breaks them kindly.
creatures.quoteCaught: loop closed. nice reflexes.

creatures.label: dawn
creatures.tagline: likes day one more than day zero.
creatures.quoteCaught: morning in your habitat starts now.

creatures.label: duskling
creatures.tagline: for evening study without the doom.
creatures.quoteCaught: night owl? more like night champion.

creatures.label: prism
creatures.tagline: your brain has facets; all are valid.
creatures.quoteCaught: you refracted focus into action. cool.

creatures.label: sorbet
creatures.tagline: sweet study breaks, no guilt topping.
creatures.quoteCaught: sweet catch—balance tastes like this.

creatures.label: raro
creatures.tagline: rare spawn, soft center.
creatures.quoteCaught: …you actually caught me. okay. we’re bonded now.

creatures.label: aurora
creatures.tagline: northern-lights brain when ideas connect.
creatures.quoteCaught: rare sky, rare you. hi.

creatures.label: comet
creatures.tagline: here for a moment, unforgettable after.
creatures.quoteCaught: didn’t blink—legend.

creatures.label: velvet
creatures.tagline: royalty who does their own laundry.
creatures.quoteCaught: your focus has taste. velvet-approved.

creatures.label: golden seed
creatures.tagline: every session plants something permanent.
creatures.quoteCaught: you planted a rare day. i’ll grow with you.
